title: The Mystery of Capital: Why Capitalism Triumphs in the West and Fails Everywhere Else
search_query: The Mystery of Capital: Why Capitalism Triumphs in the West and Fails Everywhere Else
notes: Why does capitalism triumph in the West but fail almost everywhere else? Elegantly, and with rare clarity, Hernando de Soto revolutionizes our understanding of what capital is and why it has failed to benefit four-fifths of mankind -- and explains the solution. 'A revolutionary b...
